components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for key interactions
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #44a194; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3d9286; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus { outline: 2px solid #44a194; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(68, 161, 148, 0.18); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #56656b; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #d9e0e6; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f7f9fb; border-color: #c5ced6; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus { outline: 2px solid #44a194; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0px 4px 8px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.08); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 20px; color: #1f2a2d; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; color: #56656b; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d9e0e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Outfit, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1f2a2d; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7a8891; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #44a194; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(68, 161, 148, 0.18); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

narrative.overview: A healthcare platform that feels professionally credible yet warmly approachable. The system balances clinical trustworthiness with human warmth - avoiding both the cold sterility of traditional medical software and the over-styled aesthetics of generic SaaS. Every element communicates calm competence.
keyCharacteristics: Teal/sage primary palette conveys calm and healing
Outfit typeface provides modern, friendly readability
Flat surfaces by default with subtle shadows on interaction
Refined, restrained components that don't shout for attention
Generous whitespace that breathes and reduces cognitive load
Arabic-first support with full RTL consideration

rules.name: The Calm Confidence Rule
rules.body: Primary accent (#44a194) is used for primary actions. Its rarity signals importance without overwhelming.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as response to state (hover, focus, active).

rules.name: The Readability Rule
rules.body: Body text max line length capped at 65-75ch for optimal scanning.

rules.name: The Layered Depth Rule
rules.body: Rather than heavy shadows, depth is conveyed through tonal layering.

dos: Use Calm Sage primary (#44a194) for primary actions
Keep surfaces flat by default, add shadow only on hover/focus
Support Arabic RTL - layout must flip correctly
donts: Use bright or neon accent colors
Use border-left/right colored stripes as accents
Create identical card grids with repeating cards
Use modals as first-resort for information
Create hero metric templates with big numbers and gradients
Make it feel like generic SaaS - this is healthcare
